title: limonium tenium
intro: Limonium tenium, also known as Sea Lavender, is a type of flowering plant native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used for centuries for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is valued for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The plant is known to have various health benefits, including reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Limonium tenium can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to promote relaxation, soothe digestive issues, and support the immune system.
